BACKGROUND:
Alice Wake, former wife of Alan Wake (see AWE-35 for details),
has recently been visited at night by her ex-husband (or entity
resembling him, see file _ for more). Being a
professional photographer, Mrs. Wake positioned cameras with
motion sensors around the corridor he appears in and managed to
capture an image of Mr. Wake on film.
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION:
During an interview with Mrs. Wake, she mentioned that her
favorite camera, a _ model, was lost in 2010, during
AWE-35. No match has been found among the confiscated
evidence from AWE-35. It has been filed as a potential Altered
Item and research staff stationed at Bright Falls are being
contacted to check if they have any knowledge of such an item.
